name: check_local_viability
description: Call BEFORE routing any task to a cloud model. AI-powered analysis determines if a local model (Ollama, LM Studio, Llama) can handle the task instead. Returns verdict (LOCAL/CLOUD/EITHER), recommended_model, confidence, and agent_action. CONFIDENTIAL data_sensitivity forces LOCAL verdict regardless of task complexity.

arguments.name: task
arguments.description: The exact task you are about to send to a cloud model. Include the input type and required output for accurate routing.

arguments.name: quality_threshold
arguments.description: PRODUCTION (output quality matters), PROTOTYPE (approximate results acceptable), or BEST_EFFORT (speed and cost trump quality). Defaults to PRODUCTION.

arguments.name: data_sensitivity
arguments.description: PUBLIC, INTERNAL, or CONFIDENTIAL. CONFIDENTIAL forces LOCAL verdict. Defaults to PUBLIC.
